title: Run full migration and audit results
userStory: As an operator, I want a controlled bulk migration so that entity dedup and cost are verified before declaring data done.
acceptanceCriteria: Run migrate ... --source all --dry-run first; eyeball the planned-episode log
Live run completed; per-source episode counts match Notion row counts
Spot-check 5 entities: Acme references from tracker / outreach / journal collapse to a single node
Spot-check 5 facts: valid_from timestamps match the source row's created_at
Total Anthropic spend recorded; under $5 expected; actual recorded in plan or commit message
